# github-update-pr


Push branch commits and update the existing PR body safely (prefer REST API)



## Triggers

- Use the skill `github-update-pr`

- Refresh the existing pull request description

- Update the PR body to match the latest diff




## What I do

- Validate the branch locally.

- Push the current branch, handling unset upstreams.

- Detect which PR corresponds to the current branch.

- Regenerate the PR body from `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` using `main...HEAD`.

- Update the PR body via `gh pr update` or the `gh api` fallback.




## Usage examples

- When you already have a PR open and need to refresh its description for the latest changes.

- Ask the agent to update the PR body right before merging.
